---
title: "Analyze Warm-Start Gain Difficulty"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    number_sections: true
editor_options:
  markdown:
    wrap: 72
---

Run a difficulty-model search for warm-start gain over baseline, using
the bundle-level export table.

The analysis mirrors the baseline difficulty-model search in the main
visualization workbook, but changes the target outcome to
`warm_start_gain_vs_baseline`.

```{r setup, message=FALSE}
here::i_am("vignettes/simulation pipeline/analyze_warm_start_gain_difficulty.Rmd")
library(here)
library(devtools)
devtools::load_all(".")
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)
library(purrr)

theme_set(theme_bw(base_size = 12))
```

## 1. Job Inputs

```{r inputs}
job_name <- "ensemble_scaling_full"
parent_job_id <- "50339226"
target_annotation_r2 <- 0.5

output_root <- here("output")
job_dir <- file.path(output_root, "slurm_output", job_name, parent_job_id)
consolidated_dir <- file.path(job_dir, "consolidated")
fig_dir <- file.path(job_dir, "figures", "dataset_difficulty")
dir.create(fig_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

input_csv <- file.path(
  consolidated_dir,
  sprintf("bundle_level_auprc_difficulty_data_r2_%s.csv",
          gsub("\\.", "p", as.character(target_annotation_r2)))
)

cat("Job dir:", job_dir, "\n")
cat("Input CSV:", input_csv, "\n")
cat("Figure dir:", fig_dir, "\n")
```

## 2. Load Data

```{r load}
stopifnot(file.exists(input_csv))

difficulty_model_data <- readr::read_csv(
  input_csv,
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

required_cols <- c(
  "dataset_bundle_id",
  "matrix_id",
  "M1",
  "z_topk_ratio",
  "z_max_abs",
  "z_count_abs_gt_3",
  "z_eff_signals",
  "warm_start_gain_vs_baseline"
)

missing_required <- setdiff(required_cols, names(difficulty_model_data))
if (length(missing_required)) {
  stop(
    "Input CSV is missing required columns: ",
    paste(missing_required, collapse = ", ")
  )
}

cat("Rows:", nrow(difficulty_model_data), "\n")
cat("Columns:", ncol(difficulty_model_data), "\n")
```

## 3. Helpers

```{r helpers}
html_escape <- function(x) {
  x <- gsub("&", "&amp;", x, fixed = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("<", "&lt;", x, fixed = TRUE)
  x <- gsub(">", "&gt;", x, fixed = TRUE)
  x
}

format_html_table <- function(df, digits = 4L) {
  if (is.null(df) || !nrow(df)) {
    return("<p><em>No rows.</em></p>")
  }
  df_fmt <- df
  is_num <- vapply(df_fmt, is.numeric, logical(1))
  df_fmt[is_num] <- lapply(df_fmt[is_num], function(col) round(col, digits))
  header <- paste0(
    "<tr>",
    paste(sprintf("<th>%s</th>", html_escape(names(df_fmt))), collapse = ""),
    "</tr>"
  )
  rows <- apply(as.data.frame(df_fmt, stringsAsFactors = FALSE), 1, function(row) {
    paste0(
      "<tr>",
      paste(sprintf("<td>%s</td>", html_escape(as.character(row))), collapse = ""),
      "</tr>"
    )
  })
  paste0(
    "<table class='report-table'>",
    "<thead>", header, "</thead>",
    "<tbody>", paste(rows, collapse = ""), "</tbody>",
    "</table>"
  )
}

write_html_report <- function(path, title, sections) {
  html_sections <- vapply(sections, function(section) {
    header_html <- if (!is.null(section$header) && nzchar(section$header)) {
      sprintf("<h2>%s</h2>", html_escape(section$header))
    } else {
      ""
    }
    text_html <- if (!is.null(section$text) && length(section$text)) {
      paste(sprintf("<p>%s</p>", html_escape(section$text)), collapse = "")
    } else {
      ""
    }
    digits <- if (!is.null(section$digits)) section$digits else 4L
    table_html <- if (!is.null(section$table)) {
      format_html_table(section$table, digits = digits)
    } else {
      ""
    }
    paste0(header_html, text_html, table_html)
  }, character(1))

  html <- paste0(
    "<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta charset='utf-8'>",
    "<title>", html_escape(title), "</title>",
    "<style>",
    "body{font-family:Arial,sans-serif;margin:24px;line-height:1.4;}",
    "h1,h2{margin-bottom:0.4em;}",
    ".report-table{border-collapse:collapse;width:100%;margin:12px 0 24px 0;}",
    ".report-table th,.report-table td{border:1px solid #cccccc;padding:6px 8px;text-align:left;}",
    ".report-table th{background:#f3f3f3;}",
    "code{background:#f5f5f5;padding:2px 4px;}",
    "</style></head><body>",
    "<h1>", html_escape(title), "</h1>",
    paste(html_sections, collapse = ""),
    "</body></html>"
  )

  writeLines(html, con = path, useBytes = TRUE)
}

enumerate_metric_pairs <- function(metrics) {
  if (length(metrics) < 2L) {
    return(tibble::tibble(metric1 = character(0), metric2 = character(0)))
  }
  pairs <- utils::combn(metrics, 2, simplify = FALSE)
  tibble::tibble(
    metric1 = vapply(pairs, `[`, character(1), 1),
    metric2 = vapply(pairs, `[`, character(1), 2)
  )
}

fit_difficulty_model <- function(data, outcome_col, metric1, metric2) {
  vars <- c(outcome_col, "M1", metric1, metric2)
  model_df <- data %>%
    dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(c("dataset_bundle_id", "matrix_id", vars))) %>%
    dplyr::filter(dplyr::if_all(dplyr::all_of(vars), ~ is.finite(.x)))

  formula_txt <- sprintf("%s ~ (M1 + %s + %s)^2", outcome_col, metric1, metric2)
  n_used <- nrow(model_df)

  if (n_used < 8L) {
    return(list(
      summary = tibble::tibble(
        outcome = outcome_col,
        metric1 = metric1,
        metric2 = metric2,
        formula = formula_txt,
        n_used = n_used,
        r_squared = NA_real_,
        adj_r_squared = NA_real_,
        rmse = NA_real_,
        status = "insufficient_rows",
        singular = NA
      ),
      coef = tibble::tibble(),
      predictions = model_df
    ))
  }

  fit <- tryCatch(
    stats::lm(stats::as.formula(formula_txt), data = model_df),
    error = function(e) e
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      summary = tibble::tibble(
        outcome = outcome_col,
        metric1 = metric1,
        metric2 = metric2,
        formula = formula_txt,
        n_used = n_used,
        r_squared = NA_real_,
        adj_r_squared = NA_real_,
        rmse = NA_real_,
        status = paste0("fit_error: ", fit$message),
        singular = NA
      ),
      coef = tibble::tibble(),
      predictions = model_df
    ))
  }

  fit_summary <- summary(fit)
  pred <- stats::predict(fit, newdata = model_df)
  resid <- model_df[[outcome_col]] - pred
  coef_mat <- fit_summary$coefficients
  coef_tbl <- tibble::as_tibble(coef_mat, rownames = "term") %>%
    dplyr::rename(
      estimate = "Estimate",
      std_error = "Std. Error",
      statistic = "t value",
      p_value = "Pr(>|t|)"
    )
  singular <- any(is.na(stats::coef(fit)))

  list(
    summary = tibble::tibble(
      outcome = outcome_col,
      metric1 = metric1,
      metric2 = metric2,
      formula = formula_txt,
      n_used = n_used,
      r_squared = unname(fit_summary$r.squared),
      adj_r_squared = unname(fit_summary$adj.r.squared),
      rmse = sqrt(mean(resid^2)),
      status = if (singular) "ok_singular" else "ok",
      singular = singular
    ),
    coef = coef_tbl,
    predictions = model_df %>%
      dplyr::mutate(predicted = pred, residual = resid)
  )
}
```

## 4. Model Search

```{r model-search}
candidate_metric_pool <- c(
  "M1",
  "z_topk_ratio",
  "z_max_abs",
  "z_count_abs_gt_3",
  "z_eff_signals"
)

candidate_metrics <- intersect(candidate_metric_pool, names(difficulty_model_data))
candidate_metrics <- candidate_metrics[vapply(candidate_metrics, function(metric) {
  vals <- difficulty_model_data[[metric]]
  vals <- vals[is.finite(vals)]
  length(vals) > 1L && stats::var(vals) > 0
}, logical(1))]

extra_metrics <- setdiff(candidate_metrics, "M1")
metric_pairs <- enumerate_metric_pairs(extra_metrics)

if (!("M1" %in% candidate_metrics) || nrow(metric_pairs) == 0L) {
  stop("Need M1 plus at least two varying non-M1 metrics for model search.")
}

gain_fits <- purrr::pmap(metric_pairs, function(metric1, metric2) {
  fit_difficulty_model(
    difficulty_model_data,
    "warm_start_gain_vs_baseline",
    metric1,
    metric2
  )
})

gain_model_search <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(gain_fits, `[[`, "summary")) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(
    dplyr::desc(.data$adj_r_squared),
    dplyr::desc(.data$r_squared),
    .data$metric1,
    .data$metric2
  )

best_idx <- which(gain_model_search$status %in% c("ok", "ok_singular"))[1]
if (!length(best_idx) || is.na(best_idx)) {
  stop("No successful warm-start gain model fits.")
}

best_row <- gain_model_search[best_idx, , drop = FALSE]
gain_best_fit <- fit_difficulty_model(
  difficulty_model_data,
  "warm_start_gain_vs_baseline",
  best_row$metric1[[1]],
  best_row$metric2[[1]]
)

predictions_tbl <- gain_best_fit$predictions %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    predicted_warm_start_gain_vs_baseline = .data$predicted,
    residual_warm_start_gain_vs_baseline = .data$residual
  )

difficulty_model_data <- difficulty_model_data %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    predictions_tbl %>%
      dplyr::select(
        .data$dataset_bundle_id,
        .data$predicted_warm_start_gain_vs_baseline,
        .data$residual_warm_start_gain_vs_baseline
      ),
    by = "dataset_bundle_id"
  )

kable(gain_model_search)
```

## 5. Save Reports

```{r reports}
search_html <- file.path(fig_dir, "difficulty_model_search_warm_start_gain.html")
best_fit_html <- file.path(fig_dir, "difficulty_model_refit_warm_start_gain.html")
search_csv <- file.path(fig_dir, "difficulty_model_search_warm_start_gain.csv")
coef_csv <- file.path(fig_dir, "difficulty_model_best_fit_warm_start_gain_coef.csv")
data_csv <- file.path(fig_dir, "difficulty_model_data_warm_start_gain.csv")

write_html_report(
  search_html,
  title = "Warm-start gain difficulty model search",
  sections = list(
    list(
      header = "Search Summary",
      text = c(
        paste0("Outcome: warm_start_gain_vs_baseline"),
        paste0("Candidate metrics considered: ", paste(candidate_metrics, collapse = ", ")),
        paste0("Unordered metric pairs searched: ", nrow(metric_pairs)),
        paste0("Selected pair: ", best_row$metric1[[1]], " and ", best_row$metric2[[1]]),
        paste0("Selected formula: ", best_row$formula[[1]])
      ),
      table = best_row
    ),
    list(
      header = "Selected Model Coefficients",
      table = gain_best_fit$coef
    ),
    list(
      header = "All Candidate Models",
      table = gain_model_search
    )
  )
)

write_html_report(
  best_fit_html,
  title = "Warm-start gain difficulty model refit",
  sections = list(
    list(
      header = "Model Summary",
      text = c(
        paste0("Locked metric pair: ", best_row$metric1[[1]], " and ", best_row$metric2[[1]]),
        paste0("Formula: ", best_row$formula[[1]])
      ),
      table = gain_best_fit$summary
    ),
    list(
      header = "Coefficients",
      table = gain_best_fit$coef
    )
  )
)

readr::write_csv(gain_model_search, search_csv)
readr::write_csv(gain_best_fit$coef, coef_csv)
readr::write_csv(difficulty_model_data, data_csv)

cat("Saved search HTML:", search_html, "\n")
cat("Saved refit HTML:", best_fit_html, "\n")
cat("Saved search CSV:", search_csv, "\n")
cat("Saved coef CSV:", coef_csv, "\n")
cat("Saved data CSV:", data_csv, "\n")
```

## 6. Prediction Plot Save-Only

```{r prediction-plot, fig.width=9, fig.height=6}
plot_df <- difficulty_model_data %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    is.finite(.data$predicted_warm_start_gain_vs_baseline),
    is.finite(.data$warm_start_gain_vs_baseline)
  )

if (!nrow(plot_df)) {
  stop("No rows available for prediction plot.")
}

p <- ggplot(
  plot_df,
  aes(
    x = .data$predicted_warm_start_gain_vs_baseline,
    y = .data$warm_start_gain_vs_baseline
  )
) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", color = "gray60") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", color = "gray60") +
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.75, size = 2, color = "steelblue4") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.8, color = "firebrick") +
  labs(
    x = "Predicted warm-start gain vs baseline",
    y = "Observed warm-start gain vs baseline",
    title = "Observed vs predicted warm-start gain"
  )

plot_path <- file.path(fig_dir, "difficulty_model_predictions_warm_start_gain.png")
ggsave(plot_path, p, width = 9, height = 6)

cat("Saved plot:", plot_path, "\n")
invisible(NULL)
```
